title: Minecraft but your gamemode switches every 5 minutes
description: This mod makes it so that with a simple command (/StartStopSwitch [​Player name]) your gamemode will switch every 5 minutes (right after you run the command, the first time is only 2 and a half minutes)! This was made with ZERO coding. if you would like to
body:
This mod makes it so that with a simple command (/StartStopSwitch [​Player name]) your gamemode will switch every 5 minutes (right after you run the command, the first time is only 2 and a half minutes)! This was made with ZERO coding. if you would like to make mods as well, without coding AT ALL, go check out MCreator right now!



MCreator: mcreator.net

If you have any Ideas just leave a comment. Also leave a comment telling me if you like it or dont like it!


All versions down below

If you use this mod in a video or anything like that, please give credit to me! Thanks!


--TO INSTALL--

To install simply download the Mod, and install it into your FORGE [​Version] server's mod folder.
Then you will have to install it into your game client/launcher. first make sure your client/launcher can run forge (ie. minecraft launcher, curseforge etc.). Put the same mod into your client/launcher mod folder.
Restart your server and open your client/launcher [​Version]. Now join and it should work!



--Versions--


All versions: www.mediafire.com/folder/nd522bm5oowdw/GameMode_Switcher
